evals.name: shallowref-large-list
evals.prompt: I fetch a 5000-row dataset into a ref and only ever replace it wholesale, but updates feel sluggish. How do I make this reactive state cheaper?

assertions.text: Recommends shallowRef() for the large wholesale-replaced dataset, explains only .value reassignment is tracked (deep mutations are not), notes treating the data as immutable and reassigning .value, and mentions triggerRef() if an in-place mutation must force an update

evals.name: vmemo-big-vfor
evals.prompt: A v-for list of hundreds of post rows re-renders every row whenever an unrelated piece of state changes. How do I stop the unnecessary re-renders?

assertions.text: Recommends v-memo on the v-for element with a dep array listing the values the row actually depends on, keeps a stable :key, warns the dep list must include every reactive value the sub-tree reads to avoid stale renders, and may mention props stability / passing per-item booleans instead of a shared id

evals.name: ssr-hydration-mismatch
evals.prompt: I get a hydration mismatch warning because my component renders new Date().toLocaleString() in the template under SSR. How do I fix it?

assertions.text: Explains SSR render must be deterministic so server and client output match, advises not calling Date.now()/new Date() (or Math.random/window) in render, and recommends computing the value on the server and passing it down or deferring to onMounted (e.g. a mounted flag with v-if for client-only content)

evals.name: negative-deployment-bundle-config
evals.prompt: How do I configure the Docker multi-stage build and Vite production bundle/chunk splitting to shrink the deployed image?

assertions.text: Defers to the vue-ssr-deployment skill: this is build/bundle/production deployment configuration (Docker, Vite production build), not runtime Vue render/reactivity optimization, so vue3-performance should not handle it
